name: Multi-Channel Content Distribution
description: Publish content across Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook simultaneously and track analytics of engagement

data.label: When Content Approved in Google Docs
data.description: Triggers when a document is modified

documentId.label: Document ID
documentId.description: Monitor this specific document (leave empty to monitor all)

documentId.label: Document ID
documentId.description: Monitor this specific document (leave empty to monitor all)

data.label: Post to Twitter

config.text: New content approved! Check it out: {{node_1.content}}

data.description: Create, quote, or reply to a tweet

text.label: Tweet Text
text.description: The text of the tweet. URLs will be shortened with t.co

media.label: Media URLs
media.description: Array of media URLs to attach to the tweet

reply_to.label: Reply to Tweet ID
reply_to.description: ID of the tweet to reply to (leave empty to post a new tweet)

text.label: Tweet Text
text.description: The text of the tweet. URLs will be shortened with t.co

media.label: Media URLs
media.description: Array of media URLs to attach to the tweet

reply_to.label: Reply to Tweet ID
reply_to.description: ID of the tweet to reply to (leave empty to post a new tweet)

data.label: Post to LinkedIn

config.content: New content approved! Check it out: {{node_1.content}}

data.description: Create a LinkedIn post with text, images, or articles

text.label: Post Text
text.description: Post content (special characters will be automatically escaped)

postAs.label: Post As
postAs.description: Post as yourself or an organization

imageUrl.label: Image URL
imageUrl.description: LinkedIn image asset URN (for IMAGE posts)

articleUrl.label: Article URL
articleUrl.description: URL of the article to share (required for ARTICLE posts)

binaryData.label: Binary Image Data
binaryData.description: Base64 encoded binary image data (alternative to Image URL)

thumbnailUrl.label: Article Thumbnail URL
thumbnailUrl.description: LinkedIn image asset URN for article thumbnail

binaryMimeType.label: Image Type
binaryMimeType.description: MIME type of the binary data

organizationUrn.label: Organization URN
organizationUrn.description: Organization URN (required when posting as organization)

shareMediaCategory.label: Media Type
shareMediaCategory.description: Type of media to include in the post

imageUrl.description: LinkedIn image asset URN (for IMAGE posts)

shareMediaCategory.label: Media Type

data.label: Post to Facebook

config.message: New content approved! Check it out: {{node_1.content}}

data.description: Publish a post to a Facebook page feed

link.label: Link URL
link.description: URL to attach to the post (optional)

pageId.label: Page ID
pageId.description: Facebook Page ID where the post will be published

message.label: Message
message.description: The main text content of the post

published.label: Publish Immediately
published.description: Whether to publish immediately or save as draft

link.label: Link URL
link.description: URL to attach to the post (optional)

pageId.label: Page ID
pageId.description: Facebook Page ID where the post will be published

message.label: Message
message.description: The main text content of the post

published.label: Publish Immediately
published.description: Whether to publish immediately or save as draft

data.label: Get GA4 Report
data.description: Get analytics data from Google Analytics 4 property

limit.label: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of results (only when Return All is false)

simple.label: Simplify Response
simple.description: Convert nested GA4 response into flat objects

endDate.label: End Date
endDate.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format (only for Custom Range)

metrics.label: Metrics
metrics.description: GA4 metrics to retrieve (e.g., activeUsers, sessions, conversions)

returnAll.label: Return All Results
returnAll.description: Get all results or limit to a specific number

startDate.label: Start Date
startDate.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (only for Custom Range)

dimensions.label: Dimensions
dimensions.description: GA4 dimensions to group by (e.g., date, country, city, browser)

propertyId.label: GA4 Property ID
propertyId.description: Your GA4 Property ID (found in Admin → Property Settings)

currencyCode.label: Currency Code
currencyCode.description: Currency code for monetary values (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)

data.label: Append Row
data.description: Add a new row to the end of a sheet

values.label: Values
values.description: Row data as array of values
